name: Tortilla Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 24 oz Tomato sauce, salt-free or regular
16 oz Kidney or pinto beans, canned - rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray a baking dish with nonstick spray.
3. Spread 1/4 cup of tomato sauce in the bottom of the prepared dish.
4. In a large bowl, combine remaining tomato sauce with remaining ingredients except tortillas and cheese. Mix well.
5. Arrange 1/3 of the tortilla sections over the sauce in the dish. Spread 1 cup of sauce over the tortillas.
6. Pour 1/3 of the cheese sauce over the sauce.
7. Repeat with another 1/3 of the tortillas, 1 cup of sauce, and 1/3 of the cheese sauce.
8. Repeat one more time, using remaining tortilla sections, sauce, and cheese sauce.
9. Cover and bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
10. Uncover and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
11. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
